---
title: "Global Profitability Insights and Strategic Recommendations for EcoEnergy Corp"
subtitle: "*Using Power BI*"
description: ""
categories: [Analytics, Year 4]
date: '2025-11-11'
author: 
    - "Martinas Jucys Brady"
    - "Niall Grainger" 
    - "Roisin Murphy"
    - "Aleksander Lupa"
    - "Daniel Vala"
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "On this page"
    cite-method: citeproc

about:
  template: solana

---
